page: Microsoft Azure M832s_12_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSHighMemoryv3 server family. Built on the x86_64 architecture with dedicated Intel processors, this instance is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 832 dedicated vCPUs and a massive memory capacity of 11400.0 GB, yielding approximately 13.7 GB of RAM per core.

This server does not include local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external disk attachments. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance. Given the extreme scale of its hardware resources, this instance represents a highly specialized tier designed for massive consolidation, offering high resource density for workloads that require vast memory footprints without local disk dependencies.

The M832s_12_v3 is engineered for large-scale enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for massive in-memory databases, large-scale SAP HANA deployments, heavy data warehousing, and complex enterprise resource planning systems that demand substantial memory capacity and high vCPU counts.
description: Microsoft Azure M832s_12_v3 is an ultra-high-capacity memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSHighMemoryv3 family. Powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance delivers an extraordinary 832 vCPUs and 11400.0 GB of system memory, translating to 13.7 GB of RAM per core. The server features no local storage but is Premium Storage capable, and it contains no integrated GPUs. This configuration is designed for massive enterprise workloads, offering a highly consolidated resource profile for memory-intensive applications. It is ideally suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data warehousing operations that require vast memory footprints.
